title: Gappa the Triphibian Monster
writer: Iwao Yamazaki, Ryûzô Nakanishi, William Ross
actors: Tamio Kawaji, Yôko Yamamoto, Yûji Odaka
plot: Magazine reporters Hiroyuki Kurosaki and his colleagues brought back to Japan a monster child who had just hatched from an egg issued on the isolated island of Obelisk in the South Sea.
